landing.cta.description: Join thousands of developers who are building and shipping faster with Laravel SAAS Starter. No credit card required. No subscriptions. Just clone and start building.
landing.cta.title: Ready to Launch Your SaaS?
landing.faq.description: Everything you need to know about Laravel SAAS Starter. Can't find the answer you're looking for? Contact our support team.
landing.faq.items.customization.answer: Laravel SAAS Starter uses Tailwind CSS v4 with a well-organized theme system. You can easily customize colors, fonts, and spacing through the CSS variables. All components are built with shadcn/ui patterns, making them easy to modify.
landing.faq.items.customization.question: How do I customize the design?
landing.faq.items.getting_started.answer: Getting started is easy! Clone the repository, follow the installation instructions in the README, and you'll have a fully functional SaaS application running in minutes. No complex setup required.
landing.faq.items.multiple_projects.answ: Yes! Laravel SAAS Starter is open source and free to use for unlimited personal and commercial projects. There are no per-project fees or royalties.
landing.faq.items.multiple_projects.ques: Can I use Laravel SAAS Starter for multiple projects?
landing.faq.items.production_ready.answe: Absolutely. Laravel SAAS Starter is built with production in mind, following Laravel best practices, security guidelines, and performance optimizations. Many successful SaaS products are already running on Laravel SAAS Starter.
landing.faq.items.production_ready.quest: Is Laravel SAAS Starter suitable for production?
landing.faq.items.support.answer: Yes! We provide community support through GitHub Discussions and Issues. You can ask questions, report bugs, or request features. The community is very active and helpful.
landing.faq.items.support.question: Do you offer support?
landing.faq.items.tech_stack.answer: Laravel SAAS Starter is built with Laravel 12, Inertia.js v2, React 19, and Tailwind CSS v4. It uses Laravel Fortify for authentication, Laravel Cashier for Stripe billing, and shadcn/ui-inspired components for the UI.
landing.faq.items.tech_stack.question: What tech stack does Laravel SAAS Starter use?
landing.faq.items.what_is.answer: Laravel SAAS Starter is a production-ready Laravel SaaS starter kit that includes authentication, multi-tenant workspaces, team management, Stripe billing, and more. It helps you launch your SaaS product 10x faster by providing all the essential features out of the box. Built by XCO Agency.
landing.faq.items.what_is.question: What is Laravel SAAS Starter?
landing.features.description: Stop wasting weeks on boilerplate. Everything you need is included and ready to use. Focus on building what makes your product unique.
landing.features.items.auth.description: Complete auth system with login, register, password reset, email verification, and two-factor authentication.
landing.features.items.auth.title: Authentication & 2FA
landing.features.items.billing.descripti: Full Stripe integration with subscriptions, invoices, billing portal, and multiple pricing tiers.
landing.features.items.billing.title: Stripe Billing
landing.features.items.dark_mode.descrip: Beautiful light and dark themes with system preference detection and manual toggle.
landing.features.items.dark_mode.title: Dark Mode
landing.features.items.i18n.description: Multi-language support with RTL layouts. Easily add new languages and translations.
landing.features.items.i18n.title: Internationalization
landing.features.items.security.descript: Built with security best practices including CSRF protection, rate limiting, and secure sessions.
landing.features.items.security.title: Security First
landing.features.items.stack.description: Laravel 12, Inertia.js v2, React 19, and Tailwind CSS v4 for a blazing-fast developer experience.
landing.features.items.stack.title: Modern Stack
landing.features.items.team.description: Invite team members, assign roles (owner, admin, member), and manage permissions with ease.
landing.features.items.team.title: Team Management
landing.features.items.ui.description: Pre-built components with shadcn/ui design system. Fully customizable and accessible.
landing.features.items.ui.title: Beautiful UI
landing.features.items.workspaces.descri: Built-in workspace management allowing users to create and switch between multiple organizations.
landing.features.items.workspaces.title: Multi-tenant Workspaces

landing.hero.preview.title: Production-Ready Dashboard
landing.meta.description: Laravel SAAS Starter is a production-ready Laravel SaaS starter kit with authentication, billing, teams, and everything you need to launch faster. Built by XCO Agency.
landing.meta.keywords: laravel, saas, starter kit, boilerplate, authentication, stripe, billing, teams
landing.meta.og_description: Production-ready Laravel SaaS starter kit. 100% free and open source. Launch your SaaS 10x faster with authentication, billing, teams, and more.

landing.pricing.description: No credit card required. No hidden fees. Use it for unlimited personal and commercial projects.
landing.pricing.items.free.description: No subscriptions, no per-project fees, no royalties. Use it however you want.
landing.pricing.items.free.title: 100% Free
landing.pricing.items.license.descriptio: Completely open source with permissive licensing. Commercial use is welcome.
landing.pricing.items.license.title: MIT License
landing.pricing.items.production.descrip: Battle-tested code following Laravel best practices. Ready for production use.
landing.pricing.items.production.title: Production Ready
landing.testimonials.1.author: Sarah Chen
landing.testimonials.1.quote: This starter kit saved me weeks of development time. It's incredibly well structured and easy to customize.
landing.testimonials.2.author: Alex Rivera
landing.testimonials.2.quote: The best Laravel boilerplates I've used. The code quality is outstanding and the features are exactly what I needed.
landing.testimonials.3.author: Jordan Smith
landing.testimonials.3.quote: I was able to launch my MVP in a weekend thanks to this kit. Highly recommended!
landing.testimonials.description: Here's what people are saying about Laravel SAAS Starter.
landing.testimonials.items.emily.quote: Best SaaS starter kit I've used. The Stripe integration worked flawlessly, and the dark mode looks beautiful. Highly recommended!
landing.testimonials.items.michael.quote: The code quality is exceptional. It's clear that experienced Laravel developers built this. The multi-workspace feature was exactly what we needed.
landing.testimonials.items.sarah.quote: Laravel SAAS Starter saved us months of development time. The authentication, billing, and team management were all ready to go. We launched our MVP in just 2 weeks!
landing.testimonials.title: Loved by Developers

settings.two_factor.disabled_description: When you enable two-factor authentication, you will be prompted for a secure pin during login. This pin can be retrieved from a TOTP-supported application on your phone.
settings.two_factor.enabled_description: With two-factor authentication enabled, you will be prompted for a secure, random pin during login, which you can retrieve from the TOTP-supported application on your phone.
settings.two_factor.recovery_codes.descr: Recovery codes let you regain access if you lose your 2FA device. Store them in a secure password manager.
settings.two_factor.recovery_codes.title: 2FA Recovery Codes
settings.two_factor.recovery_codes.warni: Each recovery code can be used once to access your account and will be removed after use. If you need more, click Regenerate Codes above.
settings.two_factor.setup_modal.enable_d: To finish enabling two-factor authentication, scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app
settings.two_factor.setup_modal.enabled_: Two-factor authentication is now enabled. Scan the QR code or enter the setup key in your authenticator app.
settings.two_factor.setup_modal.verify_d: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app
settings.two_factor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
